name: Landing page CTA navigates unauthenticated user to login page
description: When an unauthenticated user clicks the 'Join the movement' CTA on the landing page, they are redirected to the login page which shows a GitHub sign-in option.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage at https://firstissue.dev
Click the 'Join the movement' button in the hero section
Verify the page navigates to the /login route and displays a login form with a 'Sign in with GitHub' button prominently visible
